CVE-2015-2059.title: The stringprep_utf8_to_ucs4 function in libin before 1.31, as use ...
CVE-2015-2059.description: The stringprep_utf8_to_ucs4 function in libin before 1.31, as used in jabberd2, allows context-dependent attackers to read system memory and possibly have other unspecified impact via invalid UTF-8 characters in a string, which triggers an out-of-bounds read.

CVE-2015-8948.title: idn in GNU libidn before 1.33 might allow remote attackers to obt ...
CVE-2015-8948.description: idn in GNU libidn before 1.33 might allow remote attackers to obtain sensitive memory information by reading a zero byte as input, which triggers an out-of-bounds read.

CVE-2016-6261.title: The idna_to_ascii_4i function in lib/idna.c in libidn before 1.33 ...
CVE-2016-6261.description: The idna_to_ascii_4i function in lib/idna.c in libidn before 1.33 allows context-dependent attackers to cause a denial of service (out-of-bounds read and crash) via 64 bytes of input.

CVE-2016-6262.title: idn in libidn before 1.33 might allow remote attackers to obtain  ...
CVE-2016-6262.description: idn in libidn before 1.33 might allow remote attackers to obtain sensitive memory information by reading a zero byte as input, which triggers an out-of-bounds read, a different vulnerability than CVE-2015-8948.

CVE-2016-6263.title: The stringprep_utf8_nfkc_normalize function in lib/nfkc.c in libi ...
CVE-2016-6263.description: The stringprep_utf8_nfkc_normalize function in lib/nfkc.c in libidn before 1.33 allows context-dependent attackers to cause a denial of service (out-of-bounds read and crash) via crafted UTF-8 data.

CVE-2017-14062.title: Integer overflow in the decode_digit function in puny_decode.c in ...
CVE-2017-14062.description: Integer overflow in the decode_digit function in puny_decode.c in Libidn2 before 2.0.4 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service or possibly have unspecified other impact.
